title: multi-repo-rollout
description: Completion report schema for the multi-repo-rollout Harness v2 task type. Produced by invokeMultiGitter(); validated by validateCompletionReport() in task-types.ts and by the requireRepoCoverage guard.

repos_targeted.description: GitHub org/repo slugs that were targeted by the rollout.

repos_succeeded.description: Repos where a PR was opened (or already existed).

repos_failed.description: Repos where the rollout failed or the script exited non-zero.

pr_urls.description: One GitHub pull-request URL per succeeded repo.

summary.description: Human-readable summary: coverage fraction, success criteria, failed repos.

validation_evidence.description: PR URLs + any stderr tail from multi-gitter for audit trail.

x-guard-rule.requireRepoCoverage: len(repos_succeeded) + len(repos_failed) MUST equal len(repos_targeted). No silent drops.
